headline: VULCAN SHARPENS AGGREGATES FOCUS: EXITS CALIFORNIA CONCRETE, EXPANDS AGGREGATES FOOTPRINT IN DALLAS-FORT WORTH AND INTO COLORADO
summary: Vulcan Materials Company (NYSE: VMC), the nation's largest producer of construction aggregates, today announced that it completed the divestiture of its ready-mixed concrete operations in California and acquired the southern Colorado and Dallas-Fort Worth operations of Brannan Sand & Gravel, LLC. The strategic acquisition includes a rail-connected aggregate quarry with long-term reserves in Lamar, Colorado, and a new distribution yard in Dallas-Fort Worth.
